title: KONMAY 10pcs Big Velvet Drawstring Bags, Black 20.0x25.0cm Velevet Jewellery Pouches for Gifts, Party Favors
features: Best Material: Made of velvet cloth, with satin cord drawstring, which makes the bag easy to open and close, also protect items from scratching, keep items clean and avoid object lost.

Versatile Usage: This big size durable and reusable velvet pouch is great for small items storage, jewellery pouches, makeup bottles, dices, sachets, gift packing, party favor bags, coins, candy and so many others.
Size: Approx. 20.0x25.0cm. Please note that, the size may little different with the statement, since the bag is totally handmade and hand measured
Suitable for different occasions like wedding, shower, party, anniversary etc. You could also personalized the bag by print your logo, through the HTV,embroidery, screen print etc.
